title: 6529reviewbot release operations map
description: Public-safe map of the recurring checks, private operator evidence overlays, and release bundle commands used while preparing dogfood, production cutover, and community releases.

phases.title: Local quality gates
phases.when: Run on every bot change before opening or updating a pull request.
phases.boundary: Public-safe. These commands should not require provider keys, AWS credentials, GitHub App secrets, private payloads, or live deployment identifiers.

tools.purpose: Validate CommonJS syntax, package metadata, repository config examples, and newline hygiene.
tools.publicOutput: Safe to paste when no local paths from failures are included.

tools.purpose: Verify local Markdown links across tracked and non-ignored untracked docs.
tools.publicOutput: Safe after reviewing any failure paths.

tools.purpose: Scan public docs, config, workflows, templates, and manager memory for live-looking secrets or cloud identifiers.
tools.publicOutput: Safe; findings redact the matched value.

tools.purpose: Validate public env templates for syntax, duplicate keys, blank secret placeholders, and conservative dogfood defaults.
tools.publicOutput: Safe.

tools.purpose: Confirm committed workflow actions are pinned to reviewed commit SHAs.
tools.publicOutput: Safe.

tools.purpose: Validate the public/admin usage API OpenAPI contract consumed by 6529.io.
tools.publicOutput: Safe.

phases.title: Operator input preparation
phases.when: Run before live dogfood or production traffic, from an operator environment when private files or credentials are involved.
phases.boundary: Public repo carries templates and validators only. Live credentials, App ids, account ids, ARNs, private status files, and exact deployment targets stay outside the repo.

tools.purpose: Check central runtime configuration shape without network calls.
tools.privateInputs: Reads the current operator environment when run outside public examples.
tools.publicOutput: Share summaries only after reviewing warnings for private deployment details.

tools.purpose: Render and validate production-hosted GitHub App manifest settings without generating secrets.
tools.privateInputs: Production bot origin may be rollout-sensitive.
tools.publicOutput: Safe when hostnames are intended to be public.

tools.purpose: Exchange GitHub's one-hour manifest code and write generated credentials only to a private path.
tools.privateInputs: Manifest code, App id, client secret, webhook secret, and private key are private.
tools.publicOutput: Do not publish raw output paths or generated credential files.

tools.purpose: Render Aurora ledger schema SQL; add --apply only from the operator environment.
tools.privateInputs: Apply mode needs live AWS Data API settings.
tools.publicOutput: Schema text is public; apply evidence should be summarized.

tools.purpose: Validate central budget policy rows before optional operator apply.
tools.privateInputs: Real policy notes, requestor scopes, and rollout caps may be private.
tools.publicOutput: Share counts and high-level caps only when intended.

tools.purpose: Validate provider/model price rows, source URLs, and source-checked freshness before optional apply.
tools.privateInputs: Reviewed price files can include operator notes.
tools.publicOutput: Share provider/model coverage and freshness status, not private notes.

tools.purpose: Validate structured deployment evidence and render a redacted public summary.
tools.privateInputs: Private evidence may contain deployment details and internal evidence links.
tools.publicOutput: Only the redacted summary is intended for public release notes.

tools.purpose: Create the private release-gate, dogfood, security-review, cutover, and operator-evidence skeleton files in one workspace.
tools.privateInputs: Writes operator-owned private status and evidence files.
tools.publicOutput: Share only the public-safe summary, CLI counts, or release-candidate bundle output.

tools.purpose: Validate all current private workspace overlays together before final tag or traffic expansion decisions.
tools.privateInputs: Reads operator-owned private status and evidence files.
tools.publicOutput: Share only readiness counts or the release-candidate bundle output.

phases.title: Dogfood execution
phases.when: Use for command-only and limited initial-review rollout on trusted repositories.
phases.boundary: Repository configs and public examples live here. Real dogfood status files, exact run keys, private payloads, and detailed operator evidence stay private.

tools.purpose: Validate the target repository config PR posture and render a public-safe PR checklist before opening the target repo PR.
tools.publicOutput: Safe when the repository name is intentionally public; external config paths are redacted.

tools.purpose: Check dogfood input files, model catalog, budget policy, repository config, private workspace parsing, and optional preflight before first traffic.
tools.privateInputs: Reads operator-owned private workspace files when --operator-workspace is supplied.
tools.publicOutput: Safe after reviewing preflight diagnostics and redacted workspace counts.

tools.purpose: Create the private status skeleton for command-only and limited initial-review dogfood evidence.
tools.privateInputs: Writes an operator-owned private status file.
tools.publicOutput: Do not publish the raw private file.

tools.purpose: Fail expansion when current dogfood evidence is missing, pending, or blocked.
tools.privateInputs: Reads an operator-owned private status file.
tools.publicOutput: Share public-safe counts or release-candidate bundle output.

tools.purpose: Replay a saved GitHub webhook payload without dispatching workers.
tools.privateInputs: Payloads can include target repo metadata and user-controlled text.
tools.publicOutput: Share sanitized summaries only.

phases.title: Manual security review
phases.when: Run before broad community use, and again whenever trust boundaries, credentials, cost controls, ledger writes, provider calls, or admin APIs change.
phases.boundary: The public checklist is committed. Reviewer notes, private payload examples, and exact deployment details remain in the private status overlay.

tools.purpose: Create a private status skeleton for manual security review evidence.
tools.privateInputs: Writes an operator-owned private status file.
tools.publicOutput: Do not publish the raw private file.

tools.purpose: Fail release prep when current manual security review evidence is missing, pending, or blocked.
tools.privateInputs: Reads an operator-owned private status file.
tools.publicOutput: Share public-safe counts or release-candidate bundle output.

tools.purpose: Render or run the crypto/security analysis prompt path for a target PR when local provider/GitHub settings are configured.
tools.privateInputs: Live runs can include PR diffs, source context, provider responses, and token usage.
tools.publicOutput: Only bot comments and redacted summaries should be public.

phases.title: Production cutover
phases.when: Use when enabling live dogfood or broader production traffic.
phases.boundary: The public checklist defines what must be proven. The private status overlay owns exact deployment targets, App ids, AWS identifiers, alert routing, and admin snapshots.

tools.purpose: Create the private status skeleton for production cutover evidence.
tools.privateInputs: Writes an operator-owned private status file.
tools.publicOutput: Do not publish the raw private file.

tools.purpose: Fail broad traffic expansion when current cutover evidence is missing, pending, or blocked.
tools.privateInputs: Reads an operator-owned private status file.
tools.publicOutput: Share public-safe counts or release-candidate bundle output.

tools.purpose: Check private admin API posture through the 6529.io auth bridge without exposing raw private rows.
tools.privateInputs: Requires private admin origin and auth bridge settings.
tools.publicOutput: Share endpoint counts and pass/fail posture only.

tools.purpose: Run scheduled budget and worker-health alert evaluation from the configured operator environment.
tools.privateInputs: Reads live ledger data and alert delivery settings when enabled.
tools.publicOutput: Share redacted alert posture, not raw delivery targets or payloads.

phases.title: Release candidate and tagging
phases.when: Use for release PRs, tag/no-tag decisions, and public release notes.
phases.boundary: The release-candidate command produces a public-safe bundle. Source evidence files remain private unless an operator intentionally publishes redacted excerpts.

tools.purpose: Validate the current v0 release-gate status overlay.
tools.privateInputs: Reads an operator-owned private gate status file.
tools.publicOutput: Share public-safe counts or release-candidate bundle output.

tools.purpose: Build the public-safe release-readiness bundle from a private operator workspace, git metadata, and preflight.
tools.privateInputs: Reads operator-owned private status and evidence files.
tools.publicOutput: Designed for public PRs, issues, releases, and durable manager memory after operator review.

tools.purpose: Run the repository release gate used by CI before merging release-sensitive changes.
tools.publicOutput: Safe when failure diagnostics do not include private local details.

tools.purpose: Render this operations map for a quick command and evidence-boundary index.
tools.publicOutput: Safe.

phases.title: Support and incident response
phases.when: Use when an operator, maintainer, or community reporter needs triage evidence.
phases.boundary: Support artifacts are sanitized, but reports still need human review before public posting. Incident details can be sensitive even after redaction.

tools.purpose: Collect sanitized repository/runtime diagnostics for support triage.
tools.privateInputs: Can read local git/runtime posture.
tools.publicOutput: Review before posting because paths and feature posture may still be sensitive.

tools.purpose: Use preflight together with incident runbooks for containment and recovery posture checks.
tools.privateInputs: Reads the current operator environment when configured.
tools.publicOutput: Share only redacted summaries.
